module.name: no-literal-unions
module.description: Ban literal unions in favor of enums.

scenarios.name: should allow a type alias that references an enum
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should allow a union of non-literal types
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report a union of string literals
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report a union of numeric literals
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias
